title: API Integration
intro: Guide to connect your system with bulk campaigns and variable events in two phases.

live.pickTemplate: Select a template below to see its live schema.
live.selectForSchema: Select a template to see its live schema.

html.concepto:
Each WhatsApp template has placeholders ({{1}}, {{2}}…). Punto Pago exposes them as variable events with readable keys (amount, date, etc.).

PhaseActionRow status
1. RegistrationCreate campaign + recipients without variablesawaiting_vars
2. EventsYour system sends variables per contactready or awaiting_vars
3. SendStart campaign (complete rows only)pending → sent → delivered

This lets you register contacts first and connect variables when your CRM/ERP calculates or receives them.
html.auth:
Set the INTEGRATION_API_KEY environment variable on the server and send the header on every request:

X-API-Key: your_secret_key

Also: Authorization: Bearer your_secret_key. Without a configured key, endpoints are open (development only).

Base URL: {base}
html.paso0:
Check which keys to send for each placeholder before integrating.

GET /api/integrations/templates/{name}/variables?language=en
X-API-Key: {key}

Response: eventVariables array with key (name for your JSON), placeholder ({{1}}…), index, and required.
html.paso1:
POST /api/integrations/campaigns
Content-Type: application/json
X-API-Key: {key}
{
  "name": "March reminders",
  "template": "payment_reminder",
  "language": "en",
  "recipients": [
    {
      "phone": "50761234567",
      "name": "John Doe",
      "externalId": "customer-001"
    }
  ]
}

Save campaign.id. Use externalId to correlate with your system. Optional: variableKeys: ["amount","date"] to name keys.
html.paso2:
When you have each customer's data, inject it. Identify by externalId (recommended) or phone.

POST /api/integrations/campaigns/{campaign_id}/events
Content-Type: application/json
X-API-Key: {key}
{
  "events": [
    {
      "externalId": "customer-001",
      "variables": {
        "amount": "125.50",
        "date": "03/15/2026"
      }
    }
  ]
}

Keys in variables must match eventVariables[].key from step 0.
html.paso3:
POST /api/integrations/campaigns/{campaign_id}/start
X-API-Key: {key}

Only works if totals.awaiting_vars === 0.

GET /api/integrations/campaigns/{campaign_id}
X-API-Key: {key}
